hero.name: Nail Asadullin
hero.title: Engineering Manager / Mobile Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: Leading mobile teams and building cross-platform applications for real-world products
experience.title: Experience
experience.electrolux.manager.desc1: Leading a mobile team working on cross-platform applications for IoT appliances
experience.electrolux.manager.desc2: Responsible for delivery, planning, and coordination with product and design
experience.electrolux.manager.desc3: Supporting engineers through mentoring, code reviews, and technical guidance
experience.electrolux.engineer.desc1: Worked on a cross-platform (Android / iOS) application for IoT appliances
experience.electrolux.engineer.desc2: Used Kotlin Multiplatform, Ktor, Redux, Jetpack Compose, Swift, and SwiftUI
experience.electrolux.engineer.desc3: Contributed to application architecture, feature development, and platform integration
experience.krit.desc1: Developed Android applications for large retail and industrial companies, including logistics, trucking, and goods sorting systems
experience.krit.desc2: Led research and development of an AR application for Google Glass used in retail, which won a state tender
experience.krit.desc3: Built applications for mining environments with limited connectivity and poor lighting, using modern Android technologies and MVI architecture
experience.krit.desc4: Worked with NFC, camera-based ML scanning, and voice recognition
experience.krit.desc5: Formed and led a team of 10 developers, conducting code reviews and daily syncs
skills.title: Skills
projects.title: Projects & Impact
projects.crossPlatform.title: Cross-platform Mobile Applications for IoT Products
projects.crossPlatform.problem: The need to support complex IoT products across Android and iOS platforms while keeping business logic consistent
projects.crossPlatform.action: Designed a cross-platform architecture with shared business logic and platform-specific UI layers, collaborating closely with product and design
projects.crossPlatform.result: Delivered reliable and scalable mobile applications with consistent behavior across platforms
projects.enterprise.title: Enterprise Mobile Applications in Constrained Environments
projects.enterprise.problem: Building mobile applications for environments with limited connectivity, harsh conditions, and specialized hardware
projects.enterprise.action: Designed offline-first architectures and integrated hardware features such as NFC, camera-based ML scanning, and voice recognition
projects.enterprise.result: Enabled stable operation of mobile applications in real-world industrial and retail scenarios
projects.leadership.title: Building and Scaling Mobile Engineering Teams
projects.leadership.problem: Growing mobile products required stronger team structures, processes, and technical alignment
projects.leadership.action: Formed and led mobile teams, established development processes, and supported engineers through mentoring and code reviews
projects.leadership.result: Improved delivery predictability, code quality, and long-term sustainability of mobile development
contact.title: Contact
about.title: About
about.text: I am a mobile software engineer and engineering manager with a strong focus on product thinking, code quality, and team growth. Over the years, I’ve worked on mobile applications, backend services, and cross-platform solutions, gradually moving into leadership roles where I help teams deliver sustainable, high-quality software. I value clear communication, pragmatic architecture decisions, and continuous improvement.
